description_long: A square white ceramic plate holds a serving of creamy mashed potatoes topped with a thick, seared fillet of fish. The fish is golden-brown on top, with a moist, flaky texture visible on the sides, and is garnished with wilted green spinach leaves. The mashed potatoes are creamy and slightly textured, spreading out to cover most of the plate's surface. The plate itself is modern and minimalist, with a flat, wide rim and a shallow center. The food presentation is clean and appetizing, with the fish fillet placed centrally and the spinach distributed around it. No visible markings or decorations are present on the plate.
description: A modern square white plate with mashed potatoes, seared fish fillet, and spinach, presented in a clean and appetizing arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fish fillet prominently atop mashed potatoes and spinach, with the plate's wide rim visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the fish fillet and the creamy texture of the mashed potatoes beneath.
description_view_2: Angled view displays the golden-brown sear on the fish and the distribution of spinach around the plate.
description_view_3: Rear view reveals the back of the fish fillet and a more even spread of mashed potatoes and spinach.
